name: hyperflow
description: | Use when applying Hyperflow's orchestration doctrine in Codex, Antigravity, Grok, or another single-agent surface. Auto-invoke for non-trivial engineering work: build, implement, add, refactor, debug, fix, review, audit, plan, scope, design, brainstorm, ship, or deploy. Trigger with /hyperflow:hyperflow, "use hyperflow", "apply the doctrine", or automatically on any task-shaped message.
author: jeremylongshore
